author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone
Community Week Prizes and Exclusive Badge (July 28 - August 2),Community Week has $15,000 in assets and an exclusive badge up for grabs!  

 Community Carnival
Earn tickets all week by joining events, wagering on winners, and challenging others in Rock, Paper, Scissors! Tickets are non-tradable, participation is the only way in. Submit them in the Community Carnival at the end of the week for big prizes!

 Exclusive Badge
Join every event to claim your exclusive Community Week badge! 

 | Get your Community Week role NOW: ⁠unknown
